crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.body: Echo hit an unexpected error. Reloading the view usually fixes it.

perm.needsAccessibility: Auto-paste needs Accessibility access. Your text is on the clipboard — enable Echo under System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.

intro.accountBody: With your subunit account you get cloud transcription — GDPR-compliant, servers in Germany. Without an account, Echo runs fully on-device.
intro.accountSkipHint: You can do this later in Settings.
intro.micBody: Say something — the waves are your voice.
intro.micNoSignal: No signal yet — pick another microphone or move closer.
intro.hotkeyBody: Echo listens while you hold your hotkey. Type a few keys — the keyboard lights up with you.
intro.hotkeyChangeable: You can change it any time in Settings.
intro.modeBody: Local keeps everything on your device. Cloud is more accurate — GDPR-compliant in Germany.
intro.finaleHint2: and speak — release when you're done.
intro.finaleSuccess: That's how it works — everywhere, in any app.
intro.finaleNothingHeard: Nothing heard — keep holding the keys while you speak.
intro.finaleSkipHint: No problem — you're ready to go.

app.comingSoon: Coming in one of the next phases.

help.subtitle: Answers, an assistant and diagnostics — all right inside Echo.
help.askSub: Ask in your own words. The assistant answers based on Echo's help.
help.askError: The assistant isn't reachable right now. Check the FAQ below or email us at {{email}}.

suggest.paste: My text isn't being pasted — what do I do?
suggest.hotkey: How do I change the hotkey?
suggest.meeting: How do I record a meeting?

help.diagSub: When something breaks, diagnostics help us find the cause fast.

notes.title: Notes
notes.sub: Speak notes or type them — always in sync with your iPhone.
notes.empty: No notes yet. Record or type one — or speak it on your iPhone while out, and it shows up here.
notes.folderIsEmpty: This folder is empty. Recordings land right here.
notes.deleteMsg: This note will be removed on all your devices.
notes.folderCopied: Copied all notes in the folder
notes.folderEmpty: The folder has no notes to copy.
notes.deleteFolderMsg: The notes are kept — they're just removed from the folder.

record.errorTrialExpired: Trial expired — please upgrade your plan.
record.errorNotSignedIn: Not signed in — sign in from Settings.
record.errorModelMissing: Local engine unavailable — switch to Cloud.

models.notDownloaded: not downloaded — click to download + use

hotkey.noModifierWarning: Without a modifier (Ctrl/Alt/…) the hotkey fires on every keystroke.

update.restartHint: Echo will restart automatically in a moment.
update.oneClickHint: · one click, the rest is automatic.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to keep using cloud transcription.

home.title: Push & speak
home.emptyHistory: No transcriptions yet — hit your hotkey and get going.

history.title: History
history.latencyHint: Latency: recording stop until text inserted

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.liveDesc: Start a meeting or join one — automatic minutes & clean speaker separation. Each device records its own audio.
meetings.subtitle: Long recordings (≥ {{minutes}} min) — stored separately. Click to open the full transcript; the buttons generate summary / action items / decisions.

vocab.title: Vocabulary
vocab.subtitle: Custom terms bias Whisper and fix recurring mishearings. „Sounds like“ → becomes „written as“.
vocab.enabledSub: Replaces your terms on every dictation — independent of whether cleanup is on or off.
vocab.suggestEmpty: No suggestions yet — Echo learns from your history and surfaces recurring mishearings here.
vocab.autoSub: Echo spots recurring terms that get transcribed inconsistently and asks for the correct spelling — confident matches are learned silently.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hotkeyHint: Click, then press a key combination
settings.targetLockHint: Paste into the last focused window
settings.showBubbleHint: Compact status indicator when the orb overlay is off
settings.soundsHint: A short tone on record start and on paste.
settings.soundPasteHint: Tone when the finished text is pasted.
settings.glassStrengthHint: How strong the frosted-glass effect is — Off = flat, no blur.
settings.uiScaleHint: Scales the whole interface — smaller = compact module. The window can be dragged down to match.
settings.localModelHint: Click to select + download the model (go big with a GPU — large-v3-turbo).
settings.transcriptionLanguageHint: A fixed language is fastest. Use "Auto-detect" only for mixed languages — it costs ~½ s extra per dictation (detection pass).
settings.cloudQualityHint: Quality = fast (V3 Turbo). Highest quality = best accuracy (full V3); the final pass on release takes a few seconds longer.
settings.instantLiveTypingHint: Instant mode only: type the finished result in progressively instead of pasting all at once. Off = instant paste (Ctrl+V, atomic, reliable — recommended on Windows).
settings.instantLiveTypingLiveNote: Disabled: live streaming already types as you speak — having both on would double up.
settings.streamingHint: Transcribe while you speak (cloud only). Falls back to classic upload on any connection error.
settings.streamingDescFinal: Full result the moment you release — fastest mode.
settings.streamingDescLive: Text is written while you speak.
settings.streamingLiveTapNote: Tip: live typing is most reliable with toggle activation (tap to start/stop). In hold mode the hotkey stays pressed, which can suppress live typing in some apps (especially terminals/editors on Windows).
settings.deCommasHint: Inserts missing commas before German subordinate clauses (dass, weil, wenn …) and repairs “gesagt das er” → “gesagt, dass er” — rule-based, zero latency
settings.fillerRemovalHint: Strips „äh/ähm/hmm“ automatically — deterministic, no added latency (no AI call)
settings.aiCleanupHint: Full AI polish — smooths the text more, but costs a server call (some latency)
settings.autoModeHint: Style automatically by active window — now also by browser tab (ChatGPT/Cursor→Prompt, Gmail→Email, Slack→Slack, Docs/Notion→Formal)
settings.customRulesHint: Window title contains "text" → style. Overrides the built-in rules.
settings.orbConfiguratorHint: Live preview — every setting below takes effect instantly up here.
settings.orbPresetHint: Ready-made palettes — picking one sets all three state colors.
settings.orbProfilesSynced: Saved to your account — synced across your devices.
settings.orbProfilesLocalOnly: Saved on this device. Sign in to sync across devices.
settings.orbProfilesEmpty: No profiles yet. Style your orb above, then save it as a profile.
settings.idleModeHint: How the orb behaves when nothing's happening.
settings.orbTriggerHint: Whether the orb functions appear on hover, or only when you click the orb. In click mode, clicking the orb again hides them.
settings.idleAnimationHint: Gentle motion at rest. Off = the orb stays still and only reacts to real speech.
settings.accountHint: Sign in with auth.subunit.ai for cloud transcription
settings.signOutConfirmMessage: You'll be signed out of your Subunit account and will need to sign in again to use cloud transcription.
settings.manageAccountHint: Opens your Subunit account page in the browser
settings.loginFailed: Sign-in failed or was cancelled. Please try again.
settings.saveToSynapseHint: Write transcripts to the knowledge base
settings.updateInstalling: Installing… Echo will restart automatically in a moment.
settings.replayIntroHint: Watch the app's first-run introduction again.
settings.promptHotkeyHint: Global shortcut that shows/hides the floating Prompt Terminal
settings.promptAsTargetHint: Every transcription lands in the Prompt Terminal instead of the active app

meetLocal.cardDesc: Recording, transcript & speaker separation entirely on this device — your audio never leaves the machine. For pod meetings with one microphone.
meetLocal.title: Local meeting
meetLocal.pitch: The entire meeting pipeline runs on this device: Whisper transcription, voice check-in and speaker separation — even fully offline. Audio never leaves the machine.
meetLocal.gateBuilt: App build includes the local meet backend
meetLocal.modelHint: On first start the voice model (~26 MB) is downloaded — everything runs offline afterwards.
meetLocal.participantsEmpty: No participants yet — add names, then each person reads their number out loud so Echo learns the voices.
meetLocal.checkinPrompt: {{name}}, please read this number out loud:
meetLocal.checkinHint: Just speak towards the microphone at normal volume — about 8 seconds.
meetLocal.checkinFailed: Couldn't recognize {{name}}'s number — just click check-in again.
meetLocal.processingHint: The remaining audio is being transcribed and assigned to speakers. Depending on length this can take a few minutes — all locally.
meetLocal.gateBuiltOk: Pipeline on board: whisper.cpp + voiceprint model (ONNX)
meetLocal.gateBuiltFail: This build does not include the local pipeline
meetLocal.hwWhySilicon: Apple Silicon detected — transcription and speaker separation run smoothly right on the chip.
meetLocal.hwWhyRam: {{ram}} GB RAM — enough headroom to run Whisper and speaker separation in parallel.
meetLocal.hwWhyFail: Only {{ram}} GB RAM and no Apple Silicon — the local pipeline (Whisper + voiceprints) would be noticeably too slow on this device.
meetLocal.verdictOk: Assessment: your device is ready. Recording, transcription and speaker separation run fully offline — audio never leaves the device.
meetLocal.verdictFail: Assessment: a local meeting isn't sensible on this device — the cloud variant will deliver the better result here.

prompt.title: Prompt Terminal
prompt.libraryEmpty: No saved prompts yet — save your first draft.
prompt.tabHint: Double-click: rename · Right-click: menu · Drag: reorder
prompt.targetHint: Terminal as target: dictations land here instead of the app

palette.placeholder: Type a command or jump to a tab/library entry …

correct.hint: Correct the whole text once (typos, punctuation) — wording kept
correct.failed: Correction failed — check connection/login and retry.

mic.start: Dictate — click to record (no hotkey to hold)
mic.failed: Recording failed — needs cloud mode + login.

refine.hint: Rewrite into a clean, well-structured prompt via AI
refine.title: AI-refined
refine.failed: Refine failed — check connection/login and retry.

coach.title: Prompt Coach
coach.allGood: Strong — your prompt covers every context building block.

q.goal: What exactly should the AI do? Describe the task in at least one full sentence.
q.role: What role should the AI take? An expert in what?
q.context: What background matters? Give context about the situation.
q.format: What should the result look like? List, table, length …
q.audience: Who is the result for? Name the audience.
q.examples: Show an example of what the result should look like.
q.constraints: What should the AI avoid? Set limits: style, tone, length.

tpl.role: Role: You are an experienced expert in
tpl.format: Format: answer as a list/table/prose, at most … words.
tpl.examples: Example — the result should look like this:
